channel.title: GitHub Batchfile Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Batchfile in GitHub

item.title: PaperMC/Folia
item.description: Fork of Paper which adds regionised multithreading to the dedicated server.

item.title: enhorse/java-interview
item.description: Вопросы и ответы к интервью Java разработчика

item.title: Systems-Modeling/SysML-v2-Release
item.description: The latest incremental release of SysML v2. Start here.

item.title: ionuttbara/windows-defender-remover
item.description: A tool which is uses to remove Windows Defender in Windows 8.x, Windows 10 (every version) and Windows 11.

item.title: CesiumGS/3d-tiles
item.description: Specification for streaming massive heterogeneous 3D geospatial datasets 🌎

item.title: Azure/azure-cosmos-db-emulator-docker
item.description: This repo serves as hub for managing issues, gathering feedback, and having discussions regarding the Cosmos DB Emulator Docker.

item.title: aboutcode-org/aboutcode
item.description: AboutCode project: tools and data to uncover things about code: the provenance, origin, license, and more (packages, security, quality, etc.) of FOSS code
